creator: linuxjustin@gmail.com
text: I use the `security/stunnel` 5.23, everything is fine but the command `service stunnel status` gives me "stunnel is not running." result, even if the stunnel is running well. And when I dig into its service file `/usr/local/etc/rc.d/stunnel`, I find it looks for `/var/run/stunnel.pid` file when it gets `status` command and needs to judge if stunnel is running. However, this pid file is absent.
